text: You slip back into the room, evidence in hand. Myramar's silhouette does not turn. The air tastes of ash and old sigils.
speaker: Narrator

text: I know what you did. I have proof. Explain yourself‚ÄĒnow.
speaker: Telvar

text: Stop hiding behind ranks and titles. Speak plainly. Did you steer me into this on purpose?
speaker: Telvar

text: Then answer one thing: am I your student, or your instrument?
speaker: Telvar

text: The unreadable syllables hang like smoke. A corridor opens toward the deeper wings; the door behind you is still open to the hall.
speaker: Narrator

text: You turn your back. Footsteps you do not remember making carry you out until the world snaps to black. Load from your last save to try again.
speaker: Narrator

text: You pass the threshold into the cold draft of the wings. Whatever Myramar is, you will meet it there.
speaker: Narrator
